message:
refactor(btree,vdbe,pager): cursor borrow elimination, index traversal fix, payload_into API, dependency trimming

B-tree cursor (cursor.rs):
- Convert binary_search_table_leaf/interior from &self to associated
  functions (Self::) since they don't access cursor state, eliminating
  unnecessary borrows during seek operations
- Fix index B-tree next/prev traversal: when ascending from a child in
  an index tree, the interior separator key IS a logical entry and must
  be yielded — previously skipped, causing missing rows in index scans
- Eliminate parent.clone() in next/prev by using index-based stack access
  (self.stack[depth-1]) instead of last()/last_mut() borrow dance
- Add payload_into(&self, cx, buf) for zero-copy payload reads into a
  caller-provided buffer, avoiding allocation when overflow is absent
- Reduce clone in remove_cell_from_leaf by extracting overflow_head and
  delete_idx before mutating, scoping the borrow more tightly
- Simplify duplicate interior/leaf successor removal in delete — both
  branches had identical code, now unified
- Add root-collapse-to-leaf assertion in total-delete test
- Fix test_cursor_two_level_tree_traverse rowid insertion (use max_rowid)
- Update prefetch tests to use PrefetchProbeStore consistently
- Remove redundant test_prefetch_noop_if_unavailable and
  test_prefetch_does_not_block (covered by other prefetch tests)

Overflow (overflow.rs): Minor formatting and bounds-check improvements
Swiss index (swiss_index.rs): Minor cleanup
Traits (traits.rs): Add payload_into to BtreeCursorOps trait
Connection (connection.rs): Minor refactoring
Begin concurrent (begin_concurrent.rs): MVCC cleanup
Page cache (page_cache.rs): Cache eviction improvements
Record/serial_type (types): Formatting consistency
Codegen/engine/lib (vdbe): Minor engine loop improvements

Cargo.toml/Cargo.lock: Remove fsqlite-e2e and ftui workspace members
and their transitive dependencies (crossterm, derive_more, fancy-regex,
fluent-uri, jsonschema, icu_*, fraction, etc.), significantly reducing
the dependency tree

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
